name: yault-aesp
description: Crypto payments for the agent economy — policy-gated vault operations under human control
long_description:
AESP brings crypto payments to the agent economy. AI agents can deposit, redeem, transfer, and query on-chain vault balances — all gated by human-defined spend policies.

Every financial action passes through a policy engine that enforces per-transaction limits, rolling budgets (daily/weekly/monthly), destination allowlists, and time-window constraints. Actions that exceed thresholds are escalated to a human review queue — not silently executed.

Built on Yault's ERC-4626 vault infrastructure, AESP gives agents real economic capability while keeping humans sovereign over every dollar spent.

What agents can do:
- Deposit and redeem assets in yield-generating vaults
- Transfer allocations between parent and sub-accounts
- Check balances, authorization status, and yield breakdowns
- Operate within budgets and allowlists set by their human operators

What humans control:
- Per-transaction and rolling spend limits
- Approved destination addresses
- Time-window restrictions
- Escalation rules for high-risk actions

Get your API key at https://yault.xyz to connect your vault.

tools.name: yault_check_balance
tools.description: Check vault balance for a wallet address

tools.name: yault_deposit
tools.description: Deposit assets into an ERC-4626 vault

tools.name: yault_redeem
tools.description: Redeem vault shares back to underlying assets

tools.name: yault_check_authorization
tools.description: Check agent operator and allowance status

tools.name: yault_get_balances
tools.description: Get comprehensive balance breakdown including yield

tools.name: yault_send_payment
tools.description: Send a payment to an arbitrary wallet address

api_key.title: Yault API Key
api_key.description: Get your key at https://yault.xyz (format: sk-yault-*)
